# Solstice Azimuths as Design Elements at Angkor Wat and Nearby Temples  ...    the present study was to determine if solstice alignments are incorporated in the design of the structure. Assessment of Google Earth Pro satellite imagery and LiDAR data revealed multiple solstice alignments incorporated in the design of Angkor Wat. Expanding on this, solstice alignments were further identified for 11 nearby major temples.
